title: BeyondBerk
description: Train your dragons and take to the skies to be the best dragon trainer!
body:
![BeyondBerk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7bee9f0fcbe717b6728be0b70f91646523629784.png)
# **Welcome to Beyond Berk, the modpack that brings creativity and a world into How To Train Your Dragon.**

Unleash your imagination as you build your own Berk from the ground up and befriend dragons along your path, meet other cute animals and possibily ones that want to eat you alive! 



- 🐉 Tame & Revive Dragons- Discover powerful breeds from HTTYD Inferno & Off the Grid Dragons, and bring fallen companions back with the Gemstone of Familiar.
- ⚙️ Master the Create Mod- Build breathtaking contraptions with Steam Rails, Copycat Blocks, and endless decorative possibilities.
- 🦑 Explore New Frontiers- From Alex’s Mobs to Structory ruins, dangerous bosses in Meet Your Fight, and vast oceans to sail with Small Ships.
- 🎒 Adventure-Ready Gear-  Sophisticated Backpacks, powerful Artifacts, Open Elevators, and more to make your journey legendary.
- 🌊 Oceans, Ships & Secrets- Sail across endless waters aboard Small Ships, exploring new structures brought by Structory and Oceans Delight.
Beneath the waves, treasures and dangers await, guarded by the beasts of Alex’s Mobs.

Come join us today beyondberk.home.kg

![BisectHosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/fbdc897f-82b6-4bfc-b6a9-6d91c31ddfcb.webp)

Want to host your own server? My servers are hosted with BisectHosting because they offer 
dependable performance. Their services work well for a wide range of server types and player counts. If you wish to support me directly, use my link and use promo code <BeyondBerk> for 25% off your first month. Thank you BisectHosting for the continued support. 

**All rights are reserved to BeyondBerk, you are not allowed to use this modpack in a different server other than the official BeyondBerk Server- failure to comply will be in breach of copyright.**

A massive thank you to luckypaleo for designing art work for the server and modpack!
